Notes: Single prereq-free UPDATE attempts to add a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name, exercising RFC 2181 CNAME exclusivity handling during RFC 2136 UPDATE processing.

Steps.Description: Add a CNAME and sibling A data at the same owner name in one prereq-free UPDATE.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME RRset exists after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the UPDATE.
